Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ActionOverride

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ActionOverride
Direct Known Subclasses:
AppActionOverride
public class ActionOverride extends Object

Java class for ActionOverride complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ActionOverride">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="actionName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="comment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="content" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="formFactor" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}FormFactor" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="skipRecordTypeSelect" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="type" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ActionOverrideType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
